case_title: SF 685 GEARY STREET LLC VS. ABDULAZIZ BIN-HADHRAM ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (ENDORSED COPY RETURNED IN SASE)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF 685 GEARY STREET LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIN-HADHRAM, ABDULAZIZ THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 685 GEARY STREET, #501, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMESIS INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
